description: A graphic with a dark blue banner at the top carrying the 'FAIR' logo and the words 'FEDERATION FOR AMERICAN IMMIGRATION REFORM'. Below, large dark blue bold text reads 'The Fiscal Burden of Illegal Immigration on United States Taxpayers | 2023 Cost Study'.
